videos.headline: Bayern run rampant in 6-1 win over Bremen
videos.title: Bayern run rampant in 6-1 win over Bremen

videos.headline: Bielefeld's Pieper and Nilsson collide in bloody header attempt
videos.title: Bielefeld's Pieper and Nilsson collide in bloody header attempt
videos.caption: Late in the half, Arminia Bielefeld's Amos Pieper and Joakim Nilsson crash into one another and come down with head injuries. They would both leave the game.
videos.description: Late in the half, Arminia Bielefeld's Amos Pieper and Joakim Nilsson crash into one another and come down with head injuries. They would both leave the game.
